---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Nexo
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What can't you do today, or what's
painful about the current experience?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like Nexo to do.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways you've thought about solving this, or workarounds you use now.

## Additional context

Anything else — mockups, similar features in other apps, or how important this
is to your workflow.

> Note: Nexo is peer-to-peer and never uploads your files to a cloud server.
> Requests that would require hosted file storage are out of scope by design.
> Internet share links (still peer-to-peer, no cloud storage) are already on the
> Nexo 2.0 roadmap — see `docs/roadmap/nexo-2-share-links.md`.
